---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or addition to this repo
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature, doc improvement, or new example you're suggesting. -->

## Why would this be useful?

<!-- What problem does it solve? Who would benefit from it? -->

## Proposed approach (optional)

<!-- If you have a specific idea for how to implement it, describe it here.
     No need to have all the answers — rough ideas are welcome too. -->

## Endpoint or setup context (if applicable)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Endpoint type | <!-- e.g. vLLM, Ollama + LiteLLM, Docker Model Runner, other --> |
| OS | <!-- e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14 --> |
| Use case | <!-- What are you trying to accomplish with this setup? --> |

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Have you tried working around this another way? What didn't work or felt awkward? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, links, or examples from other projects that show what you have in mind. -->
